SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-07-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PARTIES TO EXCHANGE DOCUMENTS/EXHIBITS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DAVID LAWVER (BY ZOOM) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROPARK AMERICA WEST, LLC (JOHN STEELE) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LAWVER, DAVID PROPARK AMERICA WEST, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOHN STEELE FILED BY DEFENDANT PROPARK AMERICA WEST, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DAVID LAWVER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROPARK AMERICA WEST, LLC (JOHN STEELE) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED, CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED, (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWVER, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROPARK AMERICA WEST, LLC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 06/03/2025. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
